- **[LangGraph](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraph)** — Typed, inspectable graph orchestration for multi-step agent workflows with built-in persistence. [official](https://langchain-ai.github.io/langgraph/). Used in production at several enterprises per maintainer's [field report](https://blog.langchain.dev/langgraph-v1/). _Why it earns its place:_ first-class checkpointing and human-in-the-loop interrupts distinguish it from untyped chain builders. Apache-2.0. v1.0 stable. _Last reviewed: April 2026._
